reviews.comment:
Buena atención y ambiente en el full. Baños muy limpios. Tienen cargadores para vehículos eléctricos hace 2 años pero una lastima que todavía no estén habilitados .

(Translated by Google)
Good service and atmosphere at the full-service station. Very clean restrooms. They've had electric vehicle chargers for two years, but it's a shame they're not yet operational.

reviews.comment:
Ayer me cobraron de más....pero me di cuenta...!! me dijeron que el surtidor no había descontado la carga cliente anterior...vieja técnica de robo. Lamentable. No voy mas.

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday I was overcharged... but I realized...!! They told me the pump hadn't deducted the previous customer's charge... an old stealing technique. Regrettable. I'm not going back.
